summary: HEAD equals origin/main with no commits ahead, and recent history has no MM-1058 commit reference. Current repository state includes shared Skill/Preset input contract parsing, contractDigest exposure, frontend schema rendering/validation for Skill fields, legacy args/input normalization, and schema-less/equivalence coverage. Core MM-1058 draft lifecycle work is not implemented: no inputContractDigest is stored in draft Skill steps, no saved-vs-current or pinned digest comparison exists on reload/submit, no digest mismatch notice/backend validation result is present, pinned Skill snapshot validation is not present for drafts, and no dedicated metrics/traces for parser/renderer/validation/fallback/digest/strict-policy outcomes were found.

requirements.description: Drafts preserve entered values when a Skill input contract changes and revalidate against the current or pinned contract.
A digest mismatch produces a user-visible notice and backend validation result without losing values.
Legacy Skill-step payload readers accept older argument fields and normalize to inputs; updated authoring surfaces emit inputs.
Diagnostics have code, severity, path, message, and recoverable fields across parser, validation, renderer, and policy outcomes.

Metrics and traces cover parse success/failure, schema omitted, generated fields by widget, fallback usage, unsupported widgets, validation failures, digest mismatches, and strict-policy rejections without raw user values.
Preset rendering remains API-compatible and equivalent Skill/Preset schemas generate equivalent fields.
Store inputContractDigest in draft Skill steps.
Compare saved and current/pinned Skill input contract digests on draft reload and submit.
Preserve entered values and revalidate safely when contracts change.
Validate pinned workflow snapshots against their pinned contract rather than latest catalog version.
Expose user-safe diagnostics in Create page surfaces and richer diagnostics in admin/developer surfaces.
Add observability for parser, renderer, validation, fallback, digest mismatch, and strict-policy outcomes without raw user values.
Add end-to-end or integration-style conformance coverage for Skill/Preset rendering equivalence and schema-less Skill selection.
